# kCTFontFeatureTypeExclusiveKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontFeatureTypeExclusiveKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeaturetypeexclusivekey)

-  kCTFontFeatureTypeExclusiveKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontFeatureTypeExclusiveKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontFeatureTypeExclusiveKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeaturetypeexclusivekey#Discussion)

Key to get the font feature exclusive setting of the feature as a `CFBoolean` object. The value associated with this key indicates whether the feature selectors associated with this type should be mutually exclusive.
